# AfroTools — Africa's Everything Platform
# https://afrotools.com

> AfroTools provides free financial calculators, PDF tools, and AI-powered financial guidance for all 54 African countries. Tools include PAYE tax calculators, VAT calculators, currency converters, invoice generators, CV builders, import duty calculators, and more. All tools use real tax logic sourced directly from each country's revenue authority.

## Key Pages
- [Homepage](https://afrotools.com/)
- [All Tools](https://afrotools.com/all-tools/)
- [All Countries](https://afrotools.com/countries/)
- [Nigeria PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/nigeria/ng-salary-tax)
- [Kenya PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/kenya/ke-paye)
- [Ghana PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/ghana/gh-paye)
- [South Africa PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/south-africa/za-paye)
- [Currency Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/currency-converter/)
- [VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/vat-calculator/vat-calc)
- [PDF Workspace](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-workspace/)
- [CV Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/cv-builder/)
- [Invoice Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/invoice-generator/)
- [Import Duty Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/import-duty/)
- [Japa Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/japa-calculator/)
- [WAEC Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/waec-calculator/)

## Categories
- Salary & Tax: PAYE calculators for all 54 African countries with real tax bands from FIRS, KRA, GRA, SARS, TRA, URA, and other revenue authorities
- Document & PDF: PDF workspace (merge, split, compress), invoice generator, CV builder
- Business & Finance: VAT calculator, profit margin, import duty, currency converter, break-even analysis
- Education: WAEC/NECO calculator, GPA calculator, JAMB aggregate, flashcard maker
- Health: BMI calculator, malaria risk assessment, due date calculator
- Developer Tools: Base64 encoder, hash generator, regex tester, JSON formatter, UUID generator
- Image & Design: Background remover, image compress/crop/resize, logo maker, social card generator
- Engineering: AfroDraft professional 2D CAD tool

## Key Facts
- All tools are free, no sign-up required
- Plain HTML/CSS/JS stack, no frameworks, fast loading
- Updated when tax laws change (e.g., Kenya Finance Act 2024, Nigeria NTA 2025)
- AI Tax Advisor powered by Claude available on salary tax tools
- Covers 100+ tools across 12 categories
- PAYE calculators for all 54 African countries
